title: Wuxing Element
description: Schema for Wuxing element entries in the codex

sheng_generates.description: Element ID this element generates in the Sheng cycle

sheng_generated_by.description: Element ID that generates this element in the Sheng cycle

ke_overcomes.description: Element ID this element overcomes in the Ke cycle

ke_overcome_by.description: Element ID that overcomes this element in the Ke cycle

characters.description: Character IDs aligned to this element

puruhani.description: Puruhani IDs aligned to this element

locations.description: Location IDs with affinity to this element
